brief: A consumer crypto and multi-chain wallet app emphasising security and self-custody, available on mobile and as a browser extension. The audience is crypto-curious consumers and existing holders. Pages should cover the product, security architecture, supported chains and features, pricing/fees, and download/get-started. Lean into a sleek, futuristic aesthetic: a dark canvas, vivid gradients, glassy translucent cards, subtle glow, and a clean geometric sans-serif.
summary: Built Novault — a 5-page marketing site for a futuristic self-custody multi-chain crypto wallet, with a shared dark/glassy gradient design system, consistent nav/footer, inline-SVG visuals, and distinct content across Product, Security, Chains & Features, Pricing, and Download pages.
